creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 166675
Patch to update security/tor to 0.2.8.1-alpha

Keep in mind that with this patch, I switched back to DISTVERSION and removed the patch for the configure script as the patch does not work anymore. The configure script will now fail if the patch is used.

Thanks,
Neel Chauhan
